privileged_info_summary: The task involves processing a triage list of three patients at a medical reception. All patient data is synthetic test data created by the setup script. The triage file is located at /home/ga/Desktop/triage_list.txt and contains three patients: Alice MARTIN (DOB 1980-05-15, existing patient), Bob DUBOIS (DOB 1992-11-20, new patient), and Charlie LEFEBVRE (DOB 1975-03-10, existing patient). The task uses a MedinTux medical practice management system with a MySQL database backend. Alice and Charlie are pre-seeded in the database before task execution with GUIDs 'TRIAGE-TEST-ALICE' and 'TRIAGE-TEST-CHARLIE' respectively, while Bob is intentionally removed to simulate a new patient scenario.
